q: Do you have the same hobbies as your family members?
examiner_note: Đối với câu hỏi này, giám khảo muốn kiểm tra khả năng so sánh và đối chiếu (Comparison & Contrast) của bạn. Bạn không nhất thiết phải trả lời 'Yes'. Hãy tập trung vào việc mô tả sự tương đồng hoặc khác biệt về sở thích giữa các thành viên. Sử dụng các cấu trúc như 'share a common interest', 'drift apart', hoặc 'take after someone' để nâng điểm Lexical Resource.

band7.text: Actually, we have quite different interests. My father is really into gardening and building things, whereas I prefer more sedentary activities like reading or gaming. However, we do all enjoy traveling together during the holidays, which is a common hobby for the whole family.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, có sự đối chiếu rõ ràng giữa sở thích của bản thân và gia đình. Sử dụng tốt các từ nối như 'whereas' và 'however'.

band8.text: I’d say there's a bit of a mix. I definitely take after my mother when it comes to a love for literature and art. We can spend hours discussing books. On the other hand, my brother and father are total sports enthusiasts, which is something I’ve never really connected with. So, while there are some overlaps, we mostly have our own distinct ways of unwinding.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ tự nhiên như 'take after', 'sports enthusiasts', 'overlaps'. Cấu trúc câu phức tạp và mạch lạc.

band9.text: In all honesty, our family's leisure pursuits are quite polarized. While I've inherited a penchant for creative arts and solitary hobbies from my maternal side, the rest of my family tends to gravitate towards high-energy, outdoor activities. That being said, we do share a collective passion for culinary exploration, so we often bond over trying out exotic recipes during the weekends. It's a nice way to bridge the gap between our otherwise disparate interests.
band9.note: Vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (penchant, maternal side, gravitate towards, culinary exploration, disparate). Cách diễn đạt hết sức tự nhiên và uyển chuyển.

v.meaning: giống ai đó (về tính cách/sở thích)
v.example: I take after my mother; we both love painting.
My brother and I share a common interest in football.

v.meaning: các hoạt động ít vận động
v.example: I prefer sedentary activities like reading over playing sports.
My father is a total sports enthusiast.
Music helps me unwind after a long day at work.
Our family has very different leisure pursuits.
The hobbies in my family are quite polarized.

v.meaning: sở thích đặc biệt cho cái gì
v.example: I have a penchant for classical music.
Young people tend to gravitate towards digital hobbies.
We bond over our shared love for culinary exploration.
Cooking together helps bridge the gap between generations.

v.meaning: sở thích khác biệt hẳn nhau
v.example: Despite our disparate interests, we are a close family.
My dad is really into vintage cars.
The love for embroidery was passed down from my grandmother.

v.meaning: kết nối thông qua cái gì
v.example: We often bond over watching old movies.

v.meaning: cực kỳ thích thú với cái gì
v.example: I get a kick out of solving complex puzzles.

v.word: have a whale of a time
v.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian tuyệt vời
v.example: We had a whale of a time at the family reunion.
I've never been a big fan of outdoor activities.
Swimming is a great way to keep fit.

v.meaning: bắt đầu một sở thích mới
v.example: I decided to pick up photography last summer.
I can lose myself in a good book for hours.

v.meaning: làm gì đó để giải trí
v.example: I just play the guitar for fun, not professionally.

v.meaning: thấy cái gì đó thư giãn
v.example: Many people find gardening incredibly relaxing.

v.meaning: nơi để giải tỏa sự sáng tạo
v.example: Painting serves as a great creative outlet for me.
I play games on my phone just to kill time.
Volunteering is a very worthwhile activity.
I like to flick through fashion magazines in my spare time.
My grandparents love to go for a stroll in the park.
We often catch a movie on Friday nights.
Most teens prefer hanging out with friends over staying home.
My sister is very fond of animals.
I'm not particularly keen on team sports.
Traveling helps broaden your horizons.

v.meaning: bắt đầu (một môn thể thao/sở thích)
v.example: I'm thinking of taking up yoga.

v.meaning: người lười biếng chỉ thích dán mắt vào TV
v.example: My brother used to be a couch potato before he started gymming.
Vintage clothing is all the rage these days.
We go to the theater once in a blue moon.
For him, fixing computers is a piece of cake.
Horror movies are not really my cup of tea.
I was over the moon when I won the competition.
I had to burn the midnight oil to finish my painting.

v.meaning: quyết định nằm trong tay bạn
v.example: I've suggested some hobbies, now the ball is in your court.

v.meaning: phá vỡ sự ngại ngùng ban đầu
v.example: Playing a board game is a good way to break the ice.
I try to hit the gym at least three times a week.
My cousin loves to go extreme with skydiving.
Being a social butterfly, she attends every party.
Weekend trips are essential to recharge my batteries.

v.word: in the blink of an eye
v.example: The holidays passed in the blink of an eye.

v.word: cost an arm and a leg
v.example: Photography gear can cost an arm and a leg.
I don't know if I'll like surfing, but I'll give it a shot.
